initiatives.name: Manna House
initiatives.description: Manna House is the food distribution program of the Huntsville Dream Center, a 501(c)(3) public charity.

initiatives.name: Love Huntsville
initiatives.description: Love Huntsville is a grassroots organization working toward ending homelessness & intergenerational poverty

initiatives.name: Industrial Workers of the World - Huntsville
initiatives.description: We are workers organizing for better working conditions and wages. If you’re in Alabama or Southern Tennessee reach out and let’s talk about how we can collaborate on improving your workplace.

initiatives.name: The LGBTQ+ Closet
initiatives.description: Huntsville’s LGBTQ+ closet is open to any individual in need of free clothing. Swap, trade, and take!

initiatives.name: Rocket City Street Medics
initiatives.description: Rocket City Medic Collective (RCMC) is a group of activists and health care providers who offer medical support at protests and in our communities.

initiatives.name: Huntsville Bail Fund
initiatives.description: Huntsville Bail Fund is dedicated to addressing the disproportionate harm of pretrial detention on marginalized communities in North Alabama. Huntsville Bail Fund helps our neighbors secure their freedom by providing direct aid and advocacy to arrested individuals and their families.

initiatives.name: SURJ Huntsville
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in Huntsville. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with BIPOC-led organizations.
